chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1038 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 29.11.2016. Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhutto, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Sohail Sarwar on bhelaf of SSP Hyderabad, and SIP Muhammad Nawaz on behalf of SSP Naushehro Feroz. -.-.-. Today, Learned A.A.G has filed a progress report about the raids conducted by the police officials in compliance of the order of 14.11.2016 and according to said report the places of accused persons were found vacant. However, the police officials have undertaken that they will continue their efforts to arrest the culprits in Crime No. 198 of 2010 of P.S Moro. The same fact has been confirmed by the lady petitioner, who is present in Court today alongwith her Counsel. This petition is disposed of with the directions that police officials will provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law and to ensure that private respondents, who are wanted in a murder case, should not cause any harm or injury to the petitioner. Official respondents will also ensure that life and liberty of the petitioner is not compromised so that she can easily and without any fear give evidence before the concerned Trial Court in the above criminal case. With these observations and directions, this petition stands disposed of. Copy of this order be communicated to Home Secretary, Government of Sindh, concerned D.I.G and S.S.P as well as to A.A.G for compliance, issuing necessary directions and action. JUDGE Ali Haider
